section.title: Pertanyaan yang Sering Diajukan
section.intro: Jawaban singkat seputar layanan, proses kerja sama, dan cakupan operasional PERADA GROUP. Masih ada pertanyaan lain? Tim kami siap membantu.

items.question: Apa saja layanan utama PERADA GROUP?
items.answerHtml: PERADA GROUP menghadirkan dua spesialisasi dalam satu grup. Melalui PT Perkasa Adi Yuda, kami menyediakan Logistics & Freight Forwarding — termasuk JPT, pengiriman domestik & internasional, serta customs clearance. Melalui PT Perdana Adi Yuda, kami menawarkan Human Capital & Outsourcing, event & facility support, konsultasi bisnis, serta Import & Trading (API-U) sebagai importir berijin resmi.

items.question: Apakah PT Perdana Adi Yuda bisa membantu impor barang?
items.answerHtml: Ya. PT Perdana Adi Yuda adalah importir berijin resmi yang memiliki Angka Pengenal Impor (API-U). Kami dapat mendukung kebutuhan impor mesin, peralatan industri, komponen otomotif listrik, panel surya, dan berbagai barang lainnya secara legal, terstruktur, dan sesuai regulasi perdagangan Indonesia.

items.question: Bagaimana proses kerja sama dengan PERADA GROUP?
items.answerHtml: Prosesnya dimulai dengan konsultasi kebutuhan — melalui formulir kontak, email, atau WhatsApp. Tim kami menganalisis ruang lingkup layanan, menyusun proposal atau penawaran, lalu menetapkan SLA dan mekanisme pelaksanaan. Setelah kesepakatan, layanan dijalankan dengan koordinasi terstruktur dan laporan berkala sesuai kebutuhan klien korporat.

items.question: Apakah tersedia layanan di luar Jabodetabek?
items.answerHtml: Ya. PERADA GROUP melayani klien korporat di seluruh Indonesia. Untuk logistik dan freight forwarding, jangkauan mencakup pengiriman domestik dan internasional. Untuk layanan operasional seperti outsourcing SDM, event, dan facility support, cakupan disesuaikan dengan lokasi proyek dan kebutuhan klien — tim kami akan menginformasikan detail saat konsultasi awal.

items.question: Apa perbedaan PT Perkasa Adi Yuda dan PT Perdana Adi Yuda?
items.answerHtml: PT Perkasa Adi Yuda berfokus pada logistik dan pengurusan transportasi — mengelola pengiriman barang, dokumentasi kepabeanan, dan efisiensi supply chain. PT Perdana Adi Yuda menangani dukungan operasional bisnis — SDM, event, facility management, impor API-U, hingga konsultasi pengembangan bisnis. Keduanya beroperasi di bawah PERADA GROUP sebagai satu mitra terintegrasi.

items.question: Apakah PERADA GROUP melayani klien korporat dan industri?
items.answerHtml: Ya. PERADA GROUP berpengalaman mendukung mitra korporat di berbagai sektor — mulai dari manufaktur, otomotif, telekomunikasi, hingga industri berat. Kami memahami kebutuhan kepatuhan, skala operasional, dan standar layanan yang dibutuhkan perusahaan berskala menengah hingga besar.

items.question: Bagaimana cara meminta penawaran atau konsultasi?
items.answerHtml: Anda dapat menghubungi kami melalui halaman kontak, mengirim email ke info@perada.co.id, atau WhatsApp 0812-1414-4214. Jelaskan kebutuhan bisnis Anda — tim konsultan akan merespons dalam 1–2 hari kerja.

items.question: Apakah layanan logistik mencakup customs clearance dan dokumentasi kepabeanan?
items.answerHtml: Ya. Melalui PT Perkasa Adi Yuda, layanan logistik kami mencakup customs clearance, pengurusan dokumentasi kepabeanan, dan kepatuhan regulasi dalam proses export-import. Tim kami berfokus pada efisiensi waktu, optimasi biaya, dan kepatuhan regulasi di setiap pengurusan transportasi.

section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
section.intro: Quick answers about our services, partnership process, and operational coverage. Still have questions? Our team is ready to help.

items.question: What are PERADA GROUP's main services?
items.answerHtml: PERADA GROUP offers two specializations in one group. Through PT Perkasa Adi Yuda, we provide Logistics & Freight Forwarding — including JPT, domestic & international shipping, and customs clearance. Through PT Perdana Adi Yuda, we offer Human Capital & Outsourcing, event & facility support, business consulting, and Import & Trading (API-U) as a licensed importer.

items.question: Can PT Perdana Adi Yuda help with importing goods?
items.answerHtml: Yes. PT Perdana Adi Yuda is a licensed importer with a valid Importer Identification Number (API-U). We support imports of machinery, industrial equipment, electric automotive components, solar panels, and other goods in a legal, structured manner compliant with Indonesian trade regulations.

items.question: How does the partnership process work?
items.answerHtml: It begins with a needs consultation via our contact form, email, or WhatsApp. Our team analyzes the service scope, prepares a proposal or quotation, and defines SLAs and execution mechanisms. Once agreed, services are delivered with structured coordination and periodic reporting tailored to corporate clients.

items.question: Are services available outside Greater Jakarta?
items.answerHtml: Yes. PERADA GROUP serves corporate clients across Indonesia. For logistics and freight forwarding, coverage includes domestic and international shipments. For operational services such as HR outsourcing, events, and facility support, coverage is tailored to project location and client needs — our team will confirm details during the initial consultation.

items.question: What is the difference between PT Perkasa Adi Yuda and PT Perdana Adi Yuda?
items.answerHtml: PT Perkasa Adi Yuda focuses on logistics and transportation management — handling shipments, customs documentation, and supply chain efficiency. PT Perdana Adi Yuda handles business operational support — HR, events, facility management, API-U imports, and business development consulting. Both operate under PERADA GROUP as one integrated partner.

items.question: Does PERADA GROUP serve corporate and industrial clients?
items.answerHtml: Yes. PERADA GROUP has experience supporting corporate partners across sectors — from manufacturing, automotive, and telecommunications to heavy industry. We understand the compliance, scale, and service standards required by mid-to-large enterprises.

items.question: How can I request a quotation or consultation?
items.answerHtml: Reach us via our contact page, email info@perada.co.id, or WhatsApp 0812-1414-4214. Describe your business needs — our consultants will respond within 1–2 business days.

items.question: Does the logistics service include customs clearance and documentation?
items.answerHtml: Yes. Through PT Perkasa Adi Yuda, our logistics services include customs clearance, customs documentation, and regulatory compliance for export-import processes. Our team focuses on time efficiency, cost optimization, and regulatory compliance in every transportation arrangement.
